---
title: "Multivariable calculus: Exercises"
toc: true
---

# 23 Double integrals in polar coordinates

Attempt as many of problems 1-21 odd in [this](./text/23ex-double-integrals-in-polar-coordinates.pdf){target="_blank"} file. The solutions are [here](./text/23ex-double-integrals-in-polar-coordinates-sol.pdf){target="_blank"}, under the heading Section 16.4.
